'''Core Galaxy Systems''' was one of the oldest [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturers in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. A "[[Founding Shipwright]]," it was founded around [[20,000 BBY/Legends|20,000 BBY]] during the earliest days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The company produced a stunning array of starships, including the [[Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaught]],<ref name="EGVV" /> and managed a number of smaller companies, including the [[Unidentified Core Galaxy Systems subsidiary|subsidiary]] responsible for manufacturing the ''[[Dynamic-class freighter/Legends|Dynamic]]''-class light freighter.

However, around [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]], the company faced vicious competition from the mighty [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. Constant price wars, industrial espionage, and mysterious accidents at many of its factories resulted in heavy financial loss for Core Galaxy Systems. When the company was forced onto the auction block, Kuat Drive Yards quickly purchased it.

Now bought out by Kuat Drive Yards, Core Galaxy Systems as a brand was retired.<ref name="EGVV" />

{{Company-stub}}
